data.title: Founders Must Be the Signal Amid Web 3.0 Noise
data.description:
Recycled buzzwords and hashtags are not enough in the modern Web 3. 0 market. If you want to break through in today’s Web 3. 0 space, the only way to do that is by creating a monopoly in something consumers want. Very few times has this been done in blockchain. Bitcoin stands as a new asset class, […] The post Founders Must Be the Signal Amid Web 3.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/25/founders-must-be-the-signal-amid-web-3-0-noise/

data.title: Tron Network Turbocharging USDT Payments, Can TRX Price Rebound?
data.description:
The relationship between Tron coin and the USDT stablecoin (Tether) has continued to strengthen. Notably, Tron Networks remains the leading blockchain platform for USDT payments. Users are not just holding USDT, but also actively moving the stablecoin on Tron. This reinforces the blockchain’s leading position for payments
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/07/25/tron-network-turbocharging-usdt-payments-can-trx-price-rebound/

data.title: What Happens to Bitcoin After All 21 Million Are Mined?
data.description:
Once all 21 million bitcoins are mined by the year 2140, the Bitcoin network will continue to function, with miners relying solely on transaction fees instead of block rewards.

The post What Happens to Bitcoin After All 21 Million Are Mined? first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/07/26/what-happens-when-21-m-bitcoin-mined/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=what-happens-when-21-m-bitcoin-mined

data.title: Ethereum ETFs Steal the Spotlight from Bitcoin
data.description:
The recent surge in interest surrounding Ethereum exchange-traded funds (ETFs) has drawn significant attention away from Bitcoin, as investors and analysts alike are increasingly captivated by the potential of Ethereum's innovative technology and its diverse range of applications within the blockchain ecosystem. With more funds entering the market and Ethereum's unique capabilities becoming more widely recognized, it appears that these new financial products centered on Ethereum are commanding more headlines and discussions in the cryptocurrency space, effectively overshadowing Bitcoin's longstanding dominance. This shift in focus highlights the evolving landscape of digital assets, as investors are eager to explore alternative opportunities that promise not only potential returns but also advancements in decentralized finance, smart contracts, and non-fungible tokens (NFTs) associated with the Ethereum network.
source: https://blocknews.com/ethereum-etfs-steal-the-spotlight-from-bitcoin/

data.title: Circle's USDC Circulation Increases by $500 Million in Recent Week
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 4.8 billion USDC and redeemed around 4.3 billion USDC in the week ending July 24, resulting in a net increase of 500 million USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC now stands at 65 billion, with reserves amounting to approximately $65.2 billion. This reserve includes about $8.9 billion in cash and $56.3 billion held in the Circle Reserve Fund.

data.title: El Salvador’s Bitcoin strategy shifts focus to government holdings as IMF deal limits public adoption
data.description:
26-7-2025 – El Salvador’s Bitcoin experiment has evolved into a government accumulation strategy with minimal impact on ordinary citizens, according to analysis from Bitcoin education advocates, as reported by Cointelegraph. Quentin Ehrenmann, general manager at NGO My First Bitcoin, told Reuters that the country’s IMF loan agreement has effectively ended Bitcoin’s legal tender status and [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/el-salvadors-bitcoin-strategy-shifts-focus-to-government-holdings-as-imf-deal-limits-public-adoption/

data.title: Galaxy digital executes historic $9 billion Bitcoin sale for early crypto whale
data.description:
26-7-2025 – Galaxy Digital has completed the largest bitcoin transaction in history, selling over 80,000 BTC valued at more than $9 billion for an early cryptocurrency investor, according to a company press release. The sale represents what Galaxy described as “one of the earliest and most significant exits from the digital asset market,” executed as [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/galaxy-digital-executes-historic-9-billion-bitcoin-sale-for-early-crypto-whale/

data.title: Altcoins Hold Steady As Bitcoin Faces Heavy Sell Pressure: Here’s Why
data.description:
Bitcoin has been fluctuating, whales are offloading, and exchange inflows are rising; yet altcoins have been on a steadier path, not collapsing. The market-wide dip earlier today, looked uneven. While BTC dropped below $116K, the total altcoin market cap still sits strong above $1. 44 trillion
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/07/25/altcoins-hold-steady-as-bitcoin-faces-heavy-sell-pressure-heres-why/

data.title: Altcoin Euphoria Meets Cooling Phase – Defensive Rotation Amid Momentum Slowdown
data.description:
Our ETH and SOL overweights paid off early in the week as altcoins led the rally. We began trimming exposure as momentum slowed, rotating into BTC and raising cash. While performance cooled, disciplined risk management preserved outperformance.
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/07/26/altcoin-euphoria-meets-cooling-phase-defensive-rotation-amid-momentum-slowdown/

data.title: New Wallet Receives Significant Ethereum Transfer
data.description: According to Foresight News, Onchain Lens monitoring has revealed that a new wallet has received 13,696.8 ETH from Galaxy, valued at approximately $49.97 million. Currently, this wallet holds a total of 100,972 ETH, with an estimated value of around $376 million.

data.title: Robert Kiyosaki slams ETFs for being ‘paper versions’ of Bitcoin, gold and silver
data.description:
Investor and “Rich Dad Poor Dad” author Robert Kiyosaki warned investors to beware of holding Bitcoin (BTC), gold and silver through exchange‑traded funds, saying those paper‑based instruments are no substitute for the real thing.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/robert-kiyosaki-slams-etfs-for-being-paper-versions-of-bitcoin-gold-and-silver/
